channel.title: Cybersecurity News Aggregator
channel.description: Latest cybersecurity news from top sources
channel.comment: News aggregated from: Cointelegraph - Security, Threatpost, Bleeping Computer, Dark Reading, Blockthreat, CryptoPotato, CryptoSlate, Krebs On Security, The Hacker News, Coindesk, GroupIB Blog, Data Breach Today, CNN.com - Crypto News, DataBreaches.net

item.title: Chinese state hackers target telcos with new malware toolkit
item.description: A China-linked advanced persistent threat actor tracked as UAT-9244 has been targeting telecommunication service providers in South America since 2024, compromising Windows, Linux, and network-edge de...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: Bing AI promoted fake OpenClaw GitHub repo pushing info-stealing malware
item.description: Fake OpenClaw installers hosted in GitHub repositories and promoted by Microsoft Bing's AI-enhanced search feature instructed users to run commands that deployed information stealers and proxy malware...
item.dc:creator: Bleeping Computer

item.title: US SEC Proposes Guidelines on How Securities Laws Can be Applied to Crypto
item.description: Like the SEC, the derivatives trading regulator, the CFTC, is also working to regulate prediction markets....
item.dc:creator: CryptoPotato

item.description: Pakistan's APT36 threat group has begun using vibe-coding to churn out mediocre malware, but at a scale that could overwhelm defenses....
item.dc:creator: Dark Reading

item.description: Rainberry, a company affiliated with the Tron network, will pay a $10 million fine. Charges against Sun will be dismissed....
item.dc:creator: Coindesk

item.title: U.S. banking agencies say capital should be same for standard or tokenized securities
item.description: The Federal Reserve and other banking regulators clarified that the capital tally in banks needs identical treatment whether securities are tokenized or not....

item.description: The Wikimedia Foundation suffered a security incident today after a self-propagating JavaScript worm began vandalizing pages and modifying user scripts across multiple wikis. [...]...
